positive: Minimalist illustration of a stylized astronaut floating among geometric, bioluminescent stars. The astronaut is rendered in a clean, silhouette style with solid black lines, holding a single, glowing geometric nebula. Background features abstract cosmic dust, vibrant cyan, magenta, and deep indigo washes. The composition must be perfectly centered, emphasizing negative space and strong contrast. Vector art aesthetic, suitable for apparel printing, high contrast, graphic novel style, clean linework, symmetrical balance, flat color blocking, ink wash technique, high resolution, ultra-detailed.
